basic_details.job_title: ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 37 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees’ State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 01 June 2026 on the official website of ESIC. A total of 37 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with MD/MS/DNB or Super Speciality MCh/DM/DrNB/FNB as per latest NMC/MCI guidelines
qualification.details: MBBS with MD/MS/DNB or Super Speciality MCh/DM/DrNB/FNB as per latest NMC/MCI guidelines. For Anaesthesiology with Surgical Super Speciality, Cardiology, Cardiothoracic Surgery, Critical Care Medicine, Diagnostic and Interventional Radiology, Endocrinology & Metabolism, Medical Gastroenterology, Medical Oncology, Neonatology, Nephrology, Neurology, Neurosurgery, Surgical Gastroenterology: In accordance with the latest guidelines of the National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI). In case of non-availability of Super-specialty Senior Residents (MCh/DM/DrNB/FNB) for Super-specialty Departments, the Senior Residents from the concerned parent Broad Specialties will be considered.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ESIC Senior Resident posts is scheduled to be held on 09 June 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Senior Resident posts at ESIC?
faq.answer: ESIC has announced a total of 37 vacancies for the Senior Resident posts across various specializations. The detailed breakdown of vacancies per post is available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for ESIC Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree with MD/MS/DNB or a Super Speciality MCh/DM/DrNB/FNB qualification as per the latest NMC/MCI guidelines to be eligible for these posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to ESIC Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Senior Resident posts is 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the government rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the ESIC Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Resident posts will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,48,669/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the ESIC Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview. Eligible candidates need to attend the interview at the specified venue with all required documents on the scheduled date.

faq.question: Q7. What documents do I need to carry for the ESIC Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for ESIC Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General and OBC category candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-, while SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for ESIC Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Document Verification followed by an Interview. Candidates are advised to be prepared for both stages.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview for ESIC Senior Resident posts going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the ESIC office in Faridabad, Haryana, with the pincode 121001. The exact address and reporting time are mentioned in the official notification.
